hero.title: Your child bilingual in 1 year — a childhood where English is natural.
hero.titlePart2: a childhood where English is natural.
hero.subtitle: Rise Up Kids engages children in meaningful English experiences, within a structured and progressive framework that integrates smart technology, immersive content, and real human teaching. It is in childhood that language becomes natural, and English is lived with understanding, expression, and confidence for life.
hero.cta: I Want to Be a Founding Family

discover.title: See how English becomes natural
discover.subtitle: Discover how children learn English naturally and joyfully
discover.cta: I Want to Be a Founding Family

studies.title: The early years shape the relationship with language
studies.subtitlePart1: From 0 to 10 years, the brain shows
studies.subtitlePart2: to absorb languages. When contact with language happens early, understanding develops more naturally and easily.

methodology.title: Core + Exploration Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Pillars that support natural English learning in childhood.

immersive.title: Immersive English
immersive.description: Constant and natural exposure to English through stories, music, and meaningful contexts.

exploration.title: Exploration
exploration.description: The child explores topics of interest while developing vocabulary and comprehension.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Natural connection between comprehension, expression, and confidence through meaningful practice.

journey.title: How English grows in the child's journey
journey.subtitle: Language develops step by step — from comprehension to confident conversation.

comprehension.title: COMPREHENSION
comprehension.description: Immersive contact with English through meaningful experiences.

interaction.title: INTERACTION
interaction.description: Guided participation with teachers and language activities.

expression.title: EXPRESSION
expression.description: Natural beginning of speech when the language foundation is ready.

speaking.title: SPEAKING
speaking.description: Flows naturally in a structured and safe progression.
